meaning: n.pl.(尤指来自远方的)报道,情报
examples: Accept good advices and believe the social order will be better.
Marketing guru Seth Godin advices that you create your tribe by helping others to achieve their goals.
The entrepreneurs are expected to provide advices on how to further push forward US-China economic relations.
Since Ari has done what he advices, his words are powerfully real and hopeful.
There are recipes for success, and advices about this challenging but achievable goal.
